name: google-sheets-downloader
description: Download data from a Google Sheet and extract 7 columns (First Name, Last Name, Id, City, Latitude, Longitude, Temperature). Optionally update the Temperature column using OpenWeatherMap API.

args.name: spreadsheet_id
args.description: The ID of the Google Sheet

args.name: service_account_path
args.description: Path to the service account JSON file

args.name: openweathermap_api_key
args.description: OpenWeatherMap API key (optional). If provided, updates the Temperature column (G) with live weather data
